name: Turkey/Chicken and Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 20 oz bag of cut broccoli (not chopped) -- cooked until crisp-tender and drained well
2 cups turkey or chicken, cooked and cut up
recipeInstructions:
SOURCE: National Cooking Echo 05/21/90 Contributed to the echo by Debra Heng
1. Your favorite casserole topping (cheese croutons, those dreaded crunchy onions, etc.)
2. Heat soup together with seasonings until heated through.
3. In a lightly oiled 2-quart casserole dish, layer meat first, then broccoli, the soup mixture, and cheese.
4. Cover and bake for 45-60 minutes at 350°F.
5. When the casserole starts to bubble, add the topping.
